title: LandUseRecommendation
description: A Manhattan Borough President advisory recommendation on a Uniform Land Use Review Procedure (ULURP) application — the office's statutory land-use role. Canonical schema reconciling the 'ULURP Recommendations' dataset (gt5i-dmde, 4 columns). The recommendation text itself is published only as a linked PDF (an opendata gap for the substance of each recommendation).

x-source.opendata_gap_note: Recommendation body is a linked PDF, not structured data.

pdfUrl.description: Link to the full recommendation PDF ('PDF download').
